3147730.name: Seed of God
3147730.description:
The first person who completes it contact me through discord and let me know !  a secret awaits you.

(as long as this text is up you can still be the first)

(Performance issues ? Press ALT+ENTER to leave fullscreen mode to access settings tab and change shadow quality back and forth one time) 

What Is It ?

Jrpg with turnbased combat using a mix of 2D Pixel and 3D.  A story arc that stretch beyond what you may expect from a solodeveloped Jrpg project. This is my first , only and last game i will ever create so i'm pouring my heart and soul for the brave few telling a story that will be something to remember. 

However this is a amature SOLO indie game that progressively will look and play better as you progress with the prologue beeing the weakest AND it will never get away completely from beeing unpolished in some aspects + surely a few bugs here and there  or spelling errors so set your expectations accordingly and think of it as FinalFantasy 7 but from Temu.  

Plot twists , curve balls, politics, religion, love , hate , sorrow,  a mature adventure that sometimes is unfair and you will either love or hate the characters in Seed of God but always have a desire to push on and explore and experience the journey together with the main cast  in the kingdom of Riebenhelm in a tragic but hopeful adventure.              Humor is blunt and direct, maybe even will shock you or make you burst in laughter.

Put yourself into detective mode for this game will not hold your hand , if you solve a secret or mystery you will be rewarded with a feel that you accomplished using your own reasoning skills for game will not tell you with flashing map arrows where to go so pay attention to dialog.

 


Avelon

A distant world surrounded by a endless Sea and shrouded in mist, protected by God, the Pillar of light.                Avelons inhabitants pray everyday to keep them safe.
With fear everyone still remember what happend a millennia ago when God failed to protect. There is also whispers of a crazy king in the east and that he may once again put Avelon in danger.

Exploration

Several towns with completely different mood and architecture with its own stores, libraries, taverns and more plus a few secrets awaits to be discovered.

Talk to people to uncover stories or initiate quests that will or will not reward you. Dive into the books at the library to understand the world or find solutions to mysteries , make decisions that will affect the game now or later or not at all.

Step into the worldmap and explore the mainstory at your own pace.

Good or Bad and even Romance ?

You will constantly be faced with morale dilemmas or choices that define who you are or how events unfold now or later and can even affect relationship with characters in Kingdom of Riebenhelm.

But caution ! once a choice is made there is no easy way of knowing what was affected so you can not micromanage your Good/Bad/Romance points. Be prepared to live with the consequence of your choice.

Earn Chards

Use tokens earned through quests or combat to unlock new skills and magic. Earn money to shop items and weapons.

Turnbased Combat

With several partymembers you combat both random encounters and visible threats using weapons , skills , items and magic and your partymembers brings their own unique weapons and skills to aid you in battle.

Gain experience points to level up your stats and beat even greaters foes all who are unique to this world

Influences

The era of SNES/PS1 JRPG and Finalfantasy 7&9  influenced greatly how character arcs and how a story should be told. Game is best described as a darker and more mature version of Finalfantasy but retain the same storybeats and type of gameplay with larger than life story.

Main Story

Story is aimed at a mature audience and have little or none creative restrictions so expect the unexpected at any given time as you travel Riebenhelm. It is a tale of a Fathers bond to his daughter. A heroic adventure full of blood,love,hate and blunt direct humor. It will take you through several towns and uniqe locations throughout your adventure and
characters you meet will be given space to tell their story for you to dive into the lore. And be sure to stop by one of the many taverns , they are the gems of Riebenhelm

Game description and trailers are kept spoiler free to not give away cast and character or events. Expect a journey of EPIC proportions that will clock in at around 25 hours 

If you want to support , be part of the game or or give me the solo developer some motivation please visit the games discord .

Successful kickstarter campaign : Thank you for supporting me !
